creator: mwlucas@easeway.com
text:
The sample supfiles (i.e.,
/usr/share/examples/cvsup/stable-supfile) list an optional tag of
"src-eBones."  Per my discussions with jdp, that is obsolete.  Users
should use "src-kerberosIV".  I don't see that it's been committed yet, so
I'm jogging an elbow.

Fix: 

Replace src-eBones with src-kerberosIV in the sample supfiles.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Look at any of the sample supfiles.
